name: claude-multi-account
description: One-time setup of two isolated Claude Code accounts (e.g. enterprise/work + personal) that run simultaneously via per-account CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR shell wrappers. Keeps the already-logged-in account on bare `claude` and wraps only the second account, so the two never contend for one credential slot (single-use OAuth token rotation otherwise forces re-login prompts). Branches the design when the existing login is the sensitive work account, and supports a symmetric two-wrapper mode. Works on Windows PowerShell 5.1/7, bash, zsh, and Git Bash; self-deletes after verified success.
